name: Stifado
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Heat oil in a heavy 4- to
5-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Toss beef
with flour in a large bowl. Add beef to pan in batches
and cook until brown, stirring occasionally, about 3
minutes per batch. Transfer browned beef to the bowl.
Add onions to pan and cook until light brown, stirring
frequently, about 5 minutes. Add tomatoes, garlic,
herbs and cumin to pan. Stir in wine and bring to a
boil. Cover and bake in oven until beef is tender,
about 2 hours. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead.
Cover and refrigerate. Rewarm the oven to 350°F before
continuing.) Stir feta into stew. Return to oven and
continue baking until cheese is heated through,
about 10 minutes. Season with salt and pepper and serve.
